intel.title: [CISA KEV] Check Point SmartConsole - Check Point SmartConsole Improper Authentication Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-16232
廠商: Check Point
產品: SmartConsole
漏洞名稱: Check Point SmartConsole Improper Authentication Vulnerability
說明: Check Point SmartConsole contains an improper authentication vulnerability which could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to obtain an application login token and use it to authenticate with full administrative privileges.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-25
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Check Point SmartConsole 存在身分驗證不當漏洞（CVE-2026-16232），已被 CISA 列入已知利用漏洞清單。未經授權的遠端攻擊者可藉此漏洞獲取登入 Token，進而取得系統的完整管理員權限。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Microsoft SharePoint - Microsoft SharePoint Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-50522
廠商: Microsoft
產品: SharePoint
漏洞名稱: Microsoft SharePoint Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability 
說明: Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability which could allow an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-25
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: 此漏洞（CVE-2026-50522）為 Microsoft SharePoint 的不安全還原序列化漏洞，已被收錄於 CISA KEV 之中。未經授權的攻擊者可利用此漏洞透過網路執行任意程式碼（RCE），對系統造成嚴重危害。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。
